title: pleurospermum bicolor
intro: Pleurospermum bicolor, also known as New Zealand peppercress or mountain pepper, is a plant species that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves and stems are rich in vitamins and minerals, offering several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Pleurospermum bicolor can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in cooking to add flavor and nutritional value to various dishes.
